title: sorghum bicolor
intro: Sorghum bicolor, also known as sorghum, is a type of drought-tolerant, tall grass plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sorghum bicolor include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of sorghum bicolor, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be made by drying the plant's leaves and roots, and are used to alleviate various health issues.
